DP.411.0000:
Are you raising different kinds of
Pokémon?\f
If you only have the same type of
Pokémon, you’ll have a hard time\r
against types it’s weak to.
DP.411.0001:
Hi, are you the flirty type?
I’m asking you this to make a point.\f
I teach at the Trainers’ School,
and I’d like to give you a lesson.\f
But before I do, I’d like you to
have this TM.\f
DP.411.0002:
You know how Pokémon have genders?
Like, there are males and females?\f
Well, the move Captivate only works
against the opposite gender.\f
For example, it only works when used
by a male Pokémon on a female.\f
The move sharply lowers the target’s
Special Attack, or Sp. Atk for short.\f
You also probably know this, but a
TM is good for only one use.\f
Choose the Pokémon wisely if you
do decide to use it.
